title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Dec 8 2022Scholars Share Their Research at Marketing Science Salon“A prelude to the rich academic experience NYU Shanghai expects to bring to the area”ResearchExternal
Nov 25 2022Award-Winning Documentary Explores the Chinese DreamThe Academy-Award nominated documentary Ascension, screened at NYU Shanghai last Friday.Community
Nov 11 2022Shen Zhihua: Why and How Did the Global Cold War Come into Being?Cold War expert Shen Zhihua gave talk on “US-Soviet Economic Decoupling and the Making of the Cold War”.Research
Oct 28 2022Art Exhibition Invites Viewers to Explore Shamanic PracticesNYU Shanghai's ICA opens a new art exhibition, welcoming viewers to explore shamanic practices. Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Oct 21 202224 Hour Film Race Screens Winning EntriesOn September 24-25, 24 Frames, NYU Shanghai’s student film club, hosted its fifth annual film race. Student
Sep 30 2022Signing Ceremony for the Naming of H!TIME Hall at NYU Shanghai Qiantan Campus HeldNYU Shanghai will name the north academic building at Qiantan Campus “H!TIME Hall.” The New Bund Campus
May 26 2022Olympic Medalist Yang Yang Speaks at Commencement 2022Olympic Medalist Yang Yang addresses graduates at Commencement 2022. Commencement
Mar 25 2022“Processes of Learning” – Business Leaders Share How Studying Abroad Shaped Their LivesThe second in a series of conversations marking 50 years since the normalization of U.S.-China relationsThe Shanghai Communiqué 50th Anniversary Event Series
Mar 25 2022A Conversation with the CFO of the Asia Infrastructure Investment BankNYUSH’s Hua Jingdong hosts the first dialogue in a series featuring international development finance leaders. Talks
Mar 18 2022TEDxNYUShanghai Presents “Momentum” in a Time of CoronavirusTEDxNYUShanghai presented its spring conference "Momentum" to an audience of about 150 online viewers.Conference & Symposium
Mar 11 2022NYU Shanghai Reads: Fuchsia Dunlop on the Magic of Chinese FoodFuchsia Dunlop, author of Shark’s Fin and Sichuan Pepper, joined us for a discussion.Talks
Mar 4 2022Award-Winning Author Regina Wang Probes the Future of China’s Sci-FiAI and Culture Center event examines how ecological themes point toward more collaborative possible futures.Talks
Feb 25 2022NYU Shanghai Hosts Panel on U.S.-China Collaboration in Higher Education Former diplomat and educators mark the 50th anniversary of the release of the Shanghai Communiqué.10th AnniversaryThe Shanghai Communiqué 50th Anniversary Event Series
Dec 30 2021“Invisible Cities” exhibition pulls audience into captivating immersive worldsImmersive student projects featured in their own public exhibition.External
Nov 18 2021In and of the City: NYU Shanghai Faculty Give Public Lectures at Pudong LibraryProfessor Wen Shuang is the 17th faculty member to participate in the “Reading and Life” Lecture Series.External
